summary: Completed testing of all 12 trust & security features. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All 12 features verified working. All major implementations correct.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Terms of Service page at /terms - verified 11/11 sections, cream background, footer links to Privacy and FAQ
Feature 2: Privacy Policy page at /privacy - verified 9/9 sections, cream background, footer links to Terms and FAQ
Feature 3: Footer links - Landing page footer has About, FAQ, Terms, Privacy links (all verified working)
Feature 4: Rate limiting on login - POST /api/auth/login returns 429 after rate limit exceeded (5 per 15 min)
Feature 5: Rate limiting on beta signup - POST /api/beta/signup rate limited (3 per hour per IP)
Feature 6: Invisible honeypot on beta signup - Hidden 'website' field verified in UI, backend accepts but doesn't save when filled
Feature 7: Email verification endpoints - GET /verify-email, POST /resend-verification working with proper auth
Feature 8: Login page email_verified field in response - UserResponse includes email_verified boolean
Feature 9: Verify Email page at /verify-email - Loading/success/error states all working
Feature 10: Secured by Stripe badge in ListingDetailModal - Verified in code at line 354-364
Feature 11: Secured by Stripe badge in TradesPage - Verified visible in modal at line 517-524, screenshot confirmed
Feature 12: Routes /terms, /privacy, /verify-email registered in App.js - All routes working

features_verified.Feature 2 - Privacy Policy page: PASSED - 9 sections including 'never sell data' statement
features_verified.Feature 3 - Footer links: PASSED - All 4 links present and working
features_verified.Feature 6 - Honeypot field: PASSED - Hidden field exists, backend handles correctly
features_verified.Feature 8 - email_verified in user respo: PASSED - Field included in login and /me response
features_verified.Feature 11 - Stripe badge on TradesPage: PASSED - Screenshot shows badge below Pay Hold button

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 trust & security features implemented correctly
Rate limiter uses in-memory storage (resets on server restart) - acceptable for current scale
Honeypot field 'website' properly hidden via CSS positioning and tabIndex=-1
Email verification emails require domain verification with Resend to actually send (NOTED as expected)
Stripe badges correctly placed in both ListingDetailModal and TradesPage near payment actions
Terms and Privacy pages have consistent styling with cream background and honey-amber headings
seed_data_creation: Beta signups created during testing (test_clean_*, test_bot_*, test_dup_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 trust & security features verified. Rate limiting is in-memory and resets on server restart. Honeypot field is invisible to humans but catches bots. Email verification emails require Resend domain verification to actually send (code is complete). Demo user has email_verified=true by default. The Stripe badges appear in ListingDetailModal below CTA buttons and in TradesPage below Pay Hold button.
mocked_api_notes: Resend email system is code-complete but domain not verified - verification emails won't actually send (expected behavior noted by main agent)
